include: gelato specialist or in-house production evidence

verified.name: 뚜오이
verified.operating_evidence: DiningCode listing crawled in 2026 shows current weekly opening hours (12:00-23:00/23:50), phone number, active menu and recent March visitor posts.
verified.independent_handmade_evidence: Recent visitor content explicitly describes it as a handmade gelato specialty shop making gelato fresh every day; a store-specific Instagram account publishes daily flavor lineups.

verified.independent_handmade_evidence: Owner-managed business profile states that the store uses Italian methods and makes gelato directly in the shop every day with seasonal fruit, fresh milk and Italian ingredients.

notes: Final count includes only rows with both current-operation evidence and independent/in-house-production evidence.
Public maps and dining directories are discovery/current-operation sources; final rows should preferably include an owner-managed or official channel.
Do not notify the user until 100 fully verified rows are complete.
